title: How to Cut Vegetables Safely
introduction: This page tells you how to cut vegetables safely using simple words and pictures.
openingParagraphs: Cutting vegetables the right way helps you cook safely and quickly.
It also makes your food look and taste better.

blocks.title: Wash your vegetables first

paragraphs.text: Before you cut vegetables, you need to wash them with clean water.

blocks.imgAlt: Capsicums being washed under running water

paragraphs.text: Put your vegetables on a cutting board. This keeps the bench clean and safe.

blocks.title: Hold the knife safely

paragraphs.text: Hold the knife by the handle and keep your fingers away from the blade.

blocks.imgAlt: A person using a knife to cut green vegetables

blocks.title: Try a julienne cut

paragraphs.text: A julienne cut makes thin long pieces. It helps food cook quickly and evenly.

blocks.imgAlt: Carrots and celery cut into thin sticks

helpParagraphs: You can ask a friend or carer to help you practice.
Or you can watch a video that shows you how to cut vegetables safely.

downloads.heading: Download this information
descriptionParagraphs: Use your browser's print option to print this page.
Download a PDF for printing, a Word document to edit or an EPUB to read in an ebook app.

about.aboutDescription: This page uses Easy Read. Easy Read uses simple words, clear structure and meaningful pictures to make information easier to understand.
